# testing/factory/http-server.factory

Factory for spinning up a test Express HTTP server with MCP Streamable HTTP transport.

## Interfaces

| Interface                                                | Description                                                          |
| -------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [TestHttpServerSetup](interfaces/TestHttpServerSetup.md) | Result of spinning up a test HTTP server with MCP transport support. |

## Functions

| Function                                                  | Description                                                                                                                                                 |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [createTestHttpServer](functions/createTestHttpServer.md) | Creates an Express HTTP server wired with MCP Streamable HTTP transport, session management, health endpoint, and SSE backward compatibility for E2E tests. |
